words.ex: The team showed remarkable resilience under pressure.
The company invested heavily in sustainability initiatives.
Quarterly revenue exceeded all expectations.
Both parties entered the negotiation with clear objectives.
Her input was decisive in reaching the final agreement.
The procurement department reviewed several supplier bids.
The supply chain bottleneck delayed production by weeks.
She worked tirelessly to meet the looming deadline.
Few executives grasped the full implications of the merger.
The board adopted a forward-looking strategy for the next decade.
Innovation is key to maintaining competitiveness in the market.
The manager was given considerable leeway to restructure the team.
Mutual consideration is essential in any successful partnership.
Analysts struggled to gauge the market's reaction to the announcement.
The delay in shipment frustrated several key clients.
Compiling the annual report was a laborious process.
Sales surpassed the threshold required for a year-end bonus.
The committee was criticized for its apparent bias toward larger firms.
The software has become remarkably sophisticated over the years.
He showed great initiative by proposing the new workflow himself.
